name: hover-card
description: Rich floating content revealed on hover or focus. Use when Tooltip is too small and Popover requires a click.

props.name: closeDelay
props.description: Milliseconds before the card closes after leaving

examples.title: User profile preview
examples.description: Username link that expands into a mini profile on hover
examples.code:
@shadcn
CN

@shadcn

Builds UI components

ai.whenToUse: Use for rich hover previews: user profile cards, link previews, inline references. Contains multiple elements — more than a tooltip can hold.
ai.whenNotToUse: Don't use for simple hover labels (use Tooltip). Don't use for click-triggered content (use Popover). Don't use as primary info on touch devices — hover doesn't exist there.
commonMistakes: Using HoverCard for critical info (invisible on touch)
Too-short openDelay causes flicker on mouse-over traffic
Omitting asChild on HoverCardTrigger with a custom element
ai.accessibilityNotes: Radix opens on hover and keyboard focus. Content must be meaningful on focus as well as hover. Consider an alternative for touch users.
